name: Potato and Leek Casserole (Vrg)
recipeIngredient: 3 cups Well-scrubbed leeks, cut into 1/2-inch pieces
2 pounds Unpeeled red potatoes, sliced into thin rounds
1/4 cup Parsley or chives (or Mixed), finely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees.
2. In a deep skillet, coat leeks and carrots with olive oil. Cover and simmer over low heat until soft.
3. Add seasonings and mix well.
4. Layer the casserole dish (with cover) with one-third of the potatoes.
5. Add half of the seasoned vegetables.
6. Repeat layers with remaining potatoes and vegetables.
7. Pour broth evenly into the casserole.
8. Cover and bake for 50 minutes at 375 degrees.
9. Uncover and bake for another 10 minutes.
10. Garnish with parsley and chives.
